scripts.zip: rm -rf /tmp/zip-build/quizaccess_proview quizaccess_proview.zip && mkdir -p /tmp/zip-build/quizaccess_proview && rsync -a --exclude='.git' --exclude='.github' --exclude='.husky' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='.zed' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='vendor' --exclude='CLAUDE.md' --exclude='.gitignore' --exclude='.phpcs.xml' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='composer.json' --exclude='composer.lock' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' --exclude='phpmd.xml' --exclude='phpstan.neon' --exclude='phpunit.xml' --exclude='*.zip' --exclude='tests' ./ /tmp/zip-build/quizaccess_proview/ && cd /tmp/zip-build && zip -r "$(cd - > /dev/null && pwd)/quizaccess_proview.zip" quizaccess_proview && echo 'Built: quizaccess_proview.zip'
